A letter   7 months
```

Happy 7 months, my love.

Time with you passes so fast. I can’t believe it’s already been seven months. But at the same time, I’m truly glad, because every month that goes by means the day we finally meet is getting closer. And that makes me so happy.

I can’t wait to give you gifts by hand. To write you things and hand them to you directly. To buy you flowers for absolutely no reason at all. I genuinely cannot wait for that time, with everything in me.

But today is our 7 months and I love you more than ever. You are my greatest gift. I am forever grateful for you, in every sense.

You bring so much to me. So much motivation, so much strength, so much power. You are the spark that brings life to my soul. Without you, my world turns grey. And my heart searches only for your presence, no matter what, no matter where, no matter how far.

I love you so much, my love. More today than yesterday, and less than tomorrow.

Always yours 🤍

24 · 03 · 2026   7 months
```
